title: Air China Cargo Expands Operations at Glasgow Prestwick

sections.heading: Service Enhancement
sections.content: Air China Cargo has announced an expansion of its operations at Glasgow Prestwick Airport. The service, which connects Chengdu with Prestwick, will now operate on a daily basis. This decision comes in response to an increase in demand for air cargo services.

sections.heading: Market Demand
sections.content: The rise in demand for cargo transport capacity has prompted Air China Cargo to enhance its current offerings. The new daily service is aimed at meeting the needs of businesses relying on air freight for logistics and supply chain management.

sections.heading: Operational Details
sections.content: The expanded service will facilitate greater connectivity between China and the UK, supporting trade and transport logistics. This strategic move reflects Air China Cargo’s commitment to improving its operational footprint in the region.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Air China Cargo ramps up Glasgow Prestwick operation
